---
title: "TimeController"
---

# TimeController

The `TimeController` library (`src/TimeController`) holds the current visualization `TimePosition`, the active `TimeKey`, and a re-entrancy guard for time updates. It is Qt-free and depends only on `TimeFrame`.

`EditorRegistry` is planned to own a `TimeController` and bridge its `std::function` callbacks to Qt signals; see `docs/developer/ui/EditorState/time_controller_extraction_roadmap.md`.
